_meta.name: modbus_function_codes
_meta.title: Public Modbus function codes and register classes
_meta.source: Modbus Application Protocol Specification v1.1b3 (public data-access function codes)
_meta.disclaimer: Covers the common public data-access function codes (read/write coils, discrete inputs, holding/input registers). It is NOT an exhaustive Modbus implementation and omits diagnostic, file-record, FIFO, and vendor-specific function codes.
